description: Sector overlay for banks, payment service providers, fintechs, electronic-money issuers, digital financial services, and related documents in Togo.

metadata.scope: Togo-only sector overlay controls for Banking and Fintech. Intended to be used with togo_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from Togolese and applicable regional legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: BCEAO Instruction No. 001-01-2024 relating to payment services in WAMU
primary_sources.issuer: Central Bank of West African States (BCEAO)

primary_sources.name: BCEAO presentation / WAMU membership including Togo
BCEAO electronic money issuing institutions list

limitations: Rules encode document-evidence checks, not a final legal determination.
Each rule requires validation against current Togolese laws, regional WAEMU/OHADA/CIMA instruments, regulator circulars, directives, codes and guidance before production reliance.
Automated results are screening signals only and must be reviewed by qualified legal/compliance professionals.

rules.title: BCEAO/WAEMU payment-service licence or authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for payment-service provider licence, BCEAO authorization, electronic-money issuer approval, or regulated status.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.

rules.title: Customer due diligence and KYC evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for customer identification, due diligence, beneficial owner, screening, or KYC controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.

rules.title: Transaction monitoring or suspicious-activity reporting evidence is present

rules.title: Financial-data privacy and consent controls are documented

rules.summary: Checks for terms, fees, dispute resolution, customer complaint, or redress process language.
